title: Naan
excerpt: Let's make Naan So so delicious and so so easy Ingredients 10 ml instant yeast 5 ml sugar 125 ml lukewarm water 750 ml flour 2,5 ml salt 90 ml oil 90 ml plain yogurt 1 egg Method Put the instant yeast, sugar and lukewarm water in a cup and cover. Leave …
html:
Let's make Naan So so delicious and so so easy

Ingredients

  • 10 ml instant yeast
  • 5 ml sugar
  • 125 ml lukewarm water
  • 750 ml flour
  • 2,5 ml salt
  • 90 ml oil
  • 90 ml plain yogurt
  • 1 egg

Method

  1. Put the instant yeast, sugar and lukewarm water in a cup and cover. Leave for 15 minutes
  2. With a fork whisk the egg, yogurt and oil together. Mix with the water mixture
  3. Put the flour and salt in a mixing bowl. Slowly start mixing in the liquid. Knead for 7 minutes. Cover and put in a bowl. Let rise.
  4. Make 8 little balls. Roll out and fry in a hot pan. Turn over. Spread with a butter and garlic mixture. (melt 250 ml butter and 90 ml finely chopped garlic in the microwave)
